column1: # Tata Solar (TPSL Gangaikondan) — RO Stage 1 HP-pump energy meter readings
# Transcribed from the handwritten energy logbook (TP Solar energy data.pdf):
#   Row 15 → RO_A_kWh_cum   |   Row 16 → RO_B_kWh_cum   |   Row 17 → RO_C_kWh_cum
#   * Feb 3 – Apr 24 transcribed by Shubham from the PDF (best-effort handwriting reads).
#   * Blank rows = either the source PDF cell was empty / illegible OR readings looked
#     inconsistent and were left out so the dashboard can interpolate cleanly.
#   * Rohan to verify questionable values against the original logbook.
#   * Each row's "daily kWh" is computed as today's cumulative minus yesterday's.
#   * Missing days INSIDE the observed window are LINEARLY INTERPOLATED (safe because
#     a cumulative meter only ever increases). The dashboard tags those rows as
#     'interpolated' on charts (hollow markers) and in the daily-log table.
